nodes.name: Laniarius
nodes.summary: Laniarius（Laniarius）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如Red-naped bushshrike、Black boubou、Lühder's bushshrike等22种鸟类。

nodes.name: Lowland sooty boubou
nodes.summary: The lowland sooty boubou (Laniarius leucorhynchus), also known as the sooty boubou, is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae. It is native to the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. References
